descricao: Allows users to add and switch between custom language files, making the game accessible in languages not officially supported by the developers. It provides a framework for the community to translate menus, part names, and UI elements. Mobile: Incompatible; relies on external file loading and font injection methods exclusive to the PC Mod Loader.
